subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 25 Apr
deck_filename: Counter Taobao Weekly Update - Week ending 25 Apr.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Performance Dashboard (as of 23 Apr 2025)

A/ Topline/P&L


Highlights

   1.

   [Topline] Apr proj ADO 176k, 98% RR; ADO as %CB 108% RR; proj ADG $2.0M,
   103%RR; ADG as %CB 110% RR
   -

      Local SIP proj ADO 92% RR, %CB -1pp MoM; low RR due to IDSIP COD
      closure with -22% daily order impact from 19 Apr onwards; expect
to recover 11%
      ADO with low-risk shops COD re-opening
      -

      CNSIP proj ADO 104% RR, %CB +0.1pp MoM; driven by optimization
      initiatives 1) price reduction; 2) new SKU ads incubation
      2.

   [P&L] Apr proj combined PC2 at Shopee level at $88k, $2.1M
   under-performance mainly due to local SIP fraud case leading to
   historical high level of COD fail and cancellation costs



B/ IDSIP fraud situation


   1.

   Total 255 fraud sellers, total loss of $1.28M from 34k identified fraud
   orders, $200k (16%) recovered from seller wallet claw back
   2.

   Progress
   1.

      Concluded the investigation of current episode of fraud situation,
      seller identification, claw back etc.
      2.

      Started BAU daily escrow of COD success cases
      3.

      Started phased COD reopening to “safer” sellers
      4.

      Submitted long-term product solution request
      3.

   Next steps [ETA: end this week]
   1.

      Align long-term re-opening criteria and proceed to reopen
      2.

      Align escrow timeline for “delivery failed + non-fraud identified”
      orders
      3.

      ID legal to get back on the offline actions possible to recover loss
      4.

      Confirm long-term solution ETA and start to plan ops resources for
      fraud check


C/ BWT



Highlights

   1.

   MY SPX experienced manpower issues in SOCs which caused MY-export and
   MY-import lead time 0.5 days longer. Discussed with MY SPX - target to
   improve 0.1~0.2 days in May and fully recover in Jun
   2.

   IDSG 97% RR, 0.1 day long
